name: Cannae Holdings, Inc.
business: Cannae Holdings, Inc. primarily acquires interests in operating companies and is engaged in actively managing and operating a core group of those companies. The company's primary assets include ownership interests in Alight (human capital management), Black Knight Football (English Premier League and other football clubs), JANA Partners (investment management), Restaurant Group (casual dining under O'Charley's and 99 Restaurants), and various other controlled subsidiaries and minority equity interests. Alight sells technology-enabled human capital management solutions to large organizations, while the Restaurant Group operates casual dining restaurants, and other subsidiaries provide fintech, insurance, and consumer flavoring products.
sellsTo: large and complex organizations for employee benefits
financial institutions and corporate customers for fintech and cybersecurity
insurance agents and advisors for life and health insurance
football fans and media partners for sports entertainment

exposures.sentence: CSI is a leading fintech, regtech and cybersecurity partner that delivers core processing, digital banking, managed cybersecurity, cybersecurity compliance, payments processing, print and electronic document distribution, and regulatory compliance solutions to financial institutions and corporate customers, both foreign and domestic.

CSI is a leading fintech, regtech and cybersecurity partner that delivers core processing, digital banking, managed cybersecurity, cybersecurity compliance, payments processing, print and electronic document distribution, and regulatory compliance solutions to financial institutions and corporate customers, both foreign and domestic.
AmeriLife is a national leader in developing, marketing and distributing life and health insurance, annuities and retirement planning solutions.

Alight is a technology-enabled services company delivering human capital management solutions to many of the world's largest and most complex organizations; this includes the implementation and administration of employee benefits (e.g., health, wealth and leaves) solutions.
Issues relating to the use of new and evolving technologies, such as Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, in Alight's offerings may result in reputational harm and liability.

Alight's data, analytics and use of Artificial Intelligence ("AI") powered tools allow them to deliver actionable insights that drive measurable outcomes, such as healthcare claims savings, for companies and their people.

Sports is one of the last remaining forms of content in the media ecosystem that is consumed live, making it must-have content for advertisers; as a result, major sports properties, and in particular top global soccer leagues which have the highest global viewership, are experiencing continued increases in the value of their media rights as networks rely on live sports content to attract and retain audiences and advertisers.

catalysts.event: BKFC acquisition of 70% ownership interest in Moreirense Futebol Clube (MFC)
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, BKFC acquired a 70% ownership interest in MFC.

catalysts.event: BKFC acquisition of remaining ownership interests in FC Lorient (FCL)
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, BKFC acquired the remaining ownership interests in FCL and now holds a 100% ownership interest in the club.

catalysts.event: Cannae acquired additional 30% ownership interest in JANA Partners
catalysts.sentence: The transaction closed on September 2, 2025 and as of December 31, 2025, the Company has a 50.0% total ownership interest in JANA Partners.

catalysts.event: Cannae invested additional $30.0 million into JANA Fund
catalysts.sentence: On September 2, 2025, Cannae invested an additional $30.0 million into the JANA Fund.
On August 26, 2025, the D&B Sale closed, and Cannae completed the disposition of its remaining ownership interests in Dun & Bradstreet, Inc. for aggregate proceeds of $540.3 million in cash.
On May 12, 2025, Cannae, Cannae LLC and the Manager ... entered into that certain Management Services Agreement Termination Agreement ... terminated the MSA in its entirety as of May 12, 2025.

catalysts.event: Transition of CEO and Chairman roles
catalysts.sentence: On May 12, 2025, Mr. Foley transitioned from his roles as Chief Executive Officer, Chief Investment Officer and Chairman of the Board of the Company and now serves as the Board's non-executive Vice Chairman ... Doug Ammerman was appointed as Chairman of the Board and Ryan R. Caswell ... now serves as the Company's Chief Executive Officer.
In November 2025, we sold approximately 2.5 million shares of common stock of Paysafe for $16.5 million.

tamClaims.claim: The domestic media rights for the Premier League total over $9 billion for the four-year period beginning with the 2025/26 season through 2028/29.
tamClaims.sentence: The domestic media rights for the Premier League remain significant, totaling over $9 billion, at recent exchange rates, for the four-year period beginning with the 2025/26 season and running through the 2028/29 season.

tamClaims.claim: The international media rights for the Premier League bring in an additional nearly $9 billion for the three-year period beginning with the 2025/26 season through 2027/28.
tamClaims.sentence: The international media rights for the Premier League have grown significantly in recent years, bringing in an additional nearly $9 billion, at recent exchange rates, for the three-year period beginning with the 2025/26 season and running through the 2027/28 season.

tamClaims.claim: The Premier League now earns more revenue internationally than domestically.
tamClaims.sentence: After the most recent renewals of broadcast rights beginning with the current season, the Premier League now earns more revenue internationally than domestically, a strong indicator of the league's growing global popularity.
